tests.prompt: Use the nemo-explore skill to figure out what my agent should do.

I want to build a NeMo agent but I have not thought through what it needs to do yet.
Help me think through what a sales-research agent on NeMo Platform should actually handle.
Before I write the YAML, can we walk through what the agent should do?
Following up on yesterday's chat about a customer-support agent on NeMo Platform. Before I write any code, I want the design right. Platform is already running.

Want to scope a NeMo agent for our HR team. Not sure what categories or tools it needs yet.
What questions should I ask in my next user research interview about checkout flow?
Help me write the discovery questions for a new product brief.
I am exploring AWS Bedrock for a new project. Walk me through agent design over there.
